mapper.sql: id, parent_id, title, `name`, `level`, `type`, `status`, sort, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into store_menu (id, parent_id, title, `name`, `level`, `type`, `status`, sort, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into store_menu
id,
parent_id,
title,
`name`,
`level`,
`type`,
`status`,
sort,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update store_menu
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`level` = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_menu set parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `level` = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into store_menu (id, parent_id, title, `name`, `level`, `type`, `status`, sort, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into store_menu (id, parent_id, title, `name`, `level`, `type`, `status`, sort, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} ) on duplicate key update id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `level` = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}

parent_id,
title,

on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`level` = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},

mapper.select: SELECT store_menu.* FROM store_menu INNER JOIN store_role_menu role_menu ON role_menu.menu_id = store_menu.id INNER JOIN store_user_role user_role ON user_role.role_id = role_menu.role_id WHERE user_role.user_id = #{userId}
